nephrosis, non-human animal
definition: Nephrosis that occurs in non-human animals.

label: STAT5 haploinsufficiency
definition: A condition characterized by haploinsufficient levels of STAT5 protein due to reduced copy number or expression of the STAT5A and/or STAT5B genes, with consequent attenuation of STAT5-mediated cytokine signalling (including IL-7 and growth hormone pathways). This condition is also associated with altered lymphocyte homeostasis and modified susceptibility to lymphoma development.

label: TTN-related myopathy, dominant-negative TTNsv
definition: A skeletal muscle disorder caused by heterozygous multi-exon in-frame structural variants of TTN (TTNsv) that escape nonsense-mediated decay and result in expression of an internally deleted titin isoform with dominant-negative effects on sarcomere structure and function. Affected individuals typically present with congenital, childhood-onset, or adult-onset proximal and/or distal muscle weakness, often accompanied by joint contractures, and may develop respiratory involvement or cardiomyopathy.

label: MCM9-related gametogenic failure
definition: A disorder of sexual differentiation caused by biallelic variation in the MCM9 gene. Affected females (46,XX) may present with primary ovarian insufficiency or ovarian dysgenesis with short stature; affected males (46,XY) may present with non-obstructive azoospermia due to meiotic failure. Biallelic MCM9 variants have also been associated with predisposition to early-onset colorectal cancer, polyposis, gastric cancer, and germ cell tumors.

label: systemic lupus erythematosus related to C1QC
definition: Any systemic lupus erythematosus in which the cause of the disease is a variation in the C1QC gene.

label: systemic lupus erythematosus related to C1QB
definition: Any systemic lupus erythematosus in which the cause of the disease is a variation in the C1QB gene.

label: green tobacco sickness
definition: An occupational illness caused by transdermal absorption of nicotine from handling wet, uncured tobacco leaves, presenting with nausea, vomiting, dizziness, headache, weakness, and other autonomic symptoms. Predominantly affects tobacco farmworkers during harvesting, topping, and curing activities.

label: BLOC1S1-related complex neurodevelopmental disorder with leukodystrophy
definition: Any complex neurodevelopmental disorder in which the cause of the disease is a variationn in the BLOC1S1 gene. The disorder is characterized by intellectual disability, global developmental delay, leukodystrophy, optic atrophy, seizures, abnormal or delayed myelination, and spasticity; some individuals also present with mild features of hypopigmentation and ocular albinism.

label: AIP-related pituitary adenoma predisposition
definition: A predisposition to pituitary adenoma due to variation(s) in the AIP gene.

label: congenital insensitivity to pain
definition: A rare hereditary sensory and autonomic neuropathy characterized by the inability to perceive physical pain from birth. Affected individuals do not feel pain from injuries, burns, or infections and cannot detect harmful levels of heat, cold, or pressure, which can lead to repeated unrecognized injuries, impaired healing, and serious complications.

label: Mediator complex-related neurodevelopmental disorder
definition: A group of neurodevelopmental disorders caused by germline mutations in genes encoding subunits of the Mediator complex, a multi-protein assembly required for RNA polymerase II-dependent transcription. Shared phenotypic features include intellectual disability, speech and language delay, behavioral abnormalities, and variable structural brain anomalies.

label: GJB2-related disorder
definition: A genetic disorder caused by a variation in the GJB2 gene, primarily associated with hearing loss and/or deafness.

label: hepatic fibrinogen storage disease
definition: An autosomal dominant disorder characterized by hypofibrinogenemia and variable liver disease (ranging from asymptomatic transaminase elevation to cirrhosis), caused by variants in FGG that lead to retention of variant fibrinogen as eosinophilic inclusions within the hepatocellular endoplasmic reticulum.
